en: Who doesn't like slang? Who doesn't like speaking informally?
Well, today's video I bring you an amazing vocabulary.
But this vocabulary is a slang word.
And that slang word is mula. Mula.
So if you don't want to say money in English, you can say mula.
So, if you're talking to your friends and then you want to talk about money,
but you're probably in front of your parents or your friend,
you don't want to be understood by other people,
so you can use the word mula.
Thank you so much for watching and I'll see you in the next one.
